sentences.target: Wir treffen uns später in der Bar.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈtʁɛfn̩ ʊns ˈʃpɛːtɐ ɪn deːɐ̯ baːɐ̯/

translations.de: Wir treffen uns später in der Bar.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈtʁɛfn̩ ʊns ˈʃpɛːtɐ ɪn deːɐ̯ baːɐ̯/
translations.en: We’ll meet later at the bar.
translations.es: Nos vemos más tarde en el bar.
translations.fr: On se retrouve plus tard au bar.
translations.it: Ci vediamo più tardi al bar.
translations.pt: Vamos nos encontrar mais tarde no bar.
translations.vi: Mình gặp nhau sau ở quán bar nhé.
translations.nl: We zien elkaar later in de bar.
translations.hi: हम बाद में बार में मिलेंगे.
translations.ro: Ne vedem mai târziu la bar.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the main clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person plural.
Reflexive personal pronoun, 1st person plural, accusative; reflexive object of 'treffen'.
Temporal adverb indicating time ('later').
Preposition governing dative here; heads the PP 'in der Bar'.
Definite article, feminine, dative singular; agrees with 'Bar'.
Common noun, feminine, dative singular; object of the preposition 'in'.

sentences.target: Neben der Bar spielt heute eine kleine Band.
sentences.reading: /ˈneːbən deːɐ̯ baːɐ̯ ʃpiːlt ˈhɔʏtə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈklaɪ̯nə bɛnt/

translations.de: Neben der Bar spielt heute eine kleine Band.
translations.ipa: /ˈneːbən deːɐ̯ baːɐ̯ ʃpiːlt ˈhɔʏtə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈklaɪ̯nə bɛnt/
translations.en: A small band is playing next to the bar today.
translations.es: Hoy toca una banda pequeña junto al bar.
translations.fr: Un petit groupe joue aujourd'hui à côté du bar.
translations.it: Oggi suona un piccolo gruppo accanto al bar.
translations.ko: 오늘 바 옆에서 작은 밴드가 연주하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天有一支小乐队在酒吧旁边演出。
translations.yue: 今日喺酒吧旁邊有一隊小型樂隊表演。
translations.ru: Сегодня рядом с баром играет небольшая группа.
translations.pt: Hoje uma banda pequena toca ao lado do bar.
translations.he: היום להקה קטנה מנגנת ליד הבר.
translations.tr: Bugün barın yanında küçük bir grup çalıyor.
translations.vi: Hôm nay có một ban nhạc nhỏ chơi bên cạnh quán bar.
translations.ar: اليوم تعزف فرقة صغيرة بجانب البار.
translations.nl: Vandaag speelt er een klein bandje naast de bar.
translations.uk: Сьогодні біля бару грає невеликий гурт.
translations.hu: Ma egy kis zenekar játszik a bár mellett.
translations.hi: आज बार के बगल में एक छोटा बैंड बज रहा है.
translations.pl: Dziś obok baru gra mały zespół.
translations.el: Σήμερα ένα μικρό συγκρότημα παίζει δίπλα στο μπαρ.
translations.nb: I dag spiller et lite band ved siden av baren.
translations.id: Hari ini ada band kecil yang bermain di sebelah bar.
translations.sv: I dag spelar ett litet band bredvid baren.
translations.ro: Astăzi cântă o trupă mică lângă bar.
translations.cs: Dnes vedle baru hraje malá kapela.
translations.da: I dag spiller et lille band ved siden af baren.
translations.fi: Tänään pieni bändi soittaa baarin vieressä.
translations.ja: 今日はバーの横で小さなバンドが演奏している。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing the dative; introduces a locative PP.
Definite article, feminine, dative singular; agrees with 'Bar'.
Common noun, feminine, dative singular; object of 'Neben'.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; verb-second position.
Temporal adverb indicating the time ('today').
Indefinite article, feminine, nominative singular; determiner of 'Band'.
Attributive adjective, feminine, nominative singular (mixed inflection -e) modifying 'Band'.
Common noun, feminine, nominative singular; subject of the clause.

sentences.target: Ich arbeite abends manchmal in der Bar.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈaʁbaɪ̯tə ˈaːbn̩ts ˈmançmaːl ɪn deːɐ̯ baːɐ̯/

translations.de: Ich arbeite abends manchmal in der Bar.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈaʁbaɪ̯tə ˈaːbn̩ts ˈmançmaːl ɪn deːɐ̯ baːɐ̯/
translations.en: I sometimes work at the bar in the evenings.
translations.es: A veces trabajo por las tardes en el bar.
translations.fr: Je travaille parfois le soir au bar.
translations.it: A volte lavoro la sera al bar.
translations.zh-Hans: 我有时晚上在酒吧上班。
translations.yue: 我有時夜晚喺酒吧做嘢。
translations.ru: Иногда по вечерам я работаю в баре.
translations.pt: Às vezes trabalho à noite no bar.
translations.vi: Thỉnh thoảng tôi làm việc ở quán bar vào buổi tối.
translations.ar: أحيانًا أعمل في المساء في البار.
translations.nl: Soms werk ik ’s avonds in de bar.
translations.uk: Іноді ввечері я працюю в барі.
translations.hi: मैं कभी-कभी शाम को बार में काम करता हूँ.
translations.el: Μερικές φορές δουλεύω τα βράδια στο μπαρ.
translations.nb: Noen ganger jobber jeg om kvelden i baren.
translations.id: Kadang-kadang saya bekerja di bar pada malam hari.
translations.sv: Ibland jobbar jag på kvällarna i baren.
translations.da: Nogle gange arbejder jeg om aftenen i baren.
translations.ja: たまに夜はバーで働いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular.
Temporal adverb indicating habitual time ('in the evenings').
Frequency adverb ('sometimes').
Preposition governing dative here (location); introduces the PP 'in der Bar'.
Definite article, feminine, dative singular; agrees with 'Bar'.
Common noun, feminine, dative singular; object of the preposition 'in'.

sentences.target: Vor der Bar wartet Lisa mit einem Cocktail.
sentences.reading: /foːɐ̯ deːɐ̯ baːɐ̯ ˈvaʁtət ˈliːza mɪt ˈaɪ̯nəm ˈkɔkteɪ̯l/

translations.de: Vor der Bar wartet Lisa mit einem Cocktail.
translations.ipa: /foːɐ̯ deːɐ̯ baːɐ̯ ˈvaʁtət ˈliːza mɪt ˈaɪ̯nəm ˈkɔkteɪ̯l/
translations.en: Lisa is waiting in front of the bar with a cocktail.
translations.es: Lisa espera frente al bar con un cóctel.
translations.fr: Lisa attend devant le bar avec un cocktail.
translations.it: Lisa aspetta davanti al bar con un cocktail.
translations.ko: 리사는 바 앞에서 칵테일을 들고 기다리고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 丽莎拿着一杯鸡尾酒在酒吧门口等着。
translations.yue: 莉莎攞住杯雞尾酒喺酒吧門口等緊。
translations.ru: Лиза ждёт у бара с коктейлем.
translations.pt: Lisa está esperando em frente ao bar com um coquetel.
translations.he: ליסה מחכה מול הבר עם קוקטייל.
translations.tr: Lisa barın önünde bir kokteylle bekliyor.
translations.vi: Lisa đang đợi trước quán bar với một ly cocktail.
translations.ar: ليزا تنتظر أمام البار ومعها كوكتيل.
translations.nl: Lisa wacht voor de bar met een cocktail.
translations.uk: Ліза чекає перед баром з коктейлем.
translations.hu: Lisa a bár előtt vár egy koktéllal.
translations.hi: लिसा बार के बाहर एक कॉकटेल के साथ इंतज़ार कर रही है.
translations.pl: Lisa czeka przed barem z koktajlem.
translations.el: Η Λίζα περιμένει μπροστά από το μπαρ με ένα κοκτέιλ.
translations.nb: Lisa venter foran baren med en cocktail.
translations.id: Lisa sedang menunggu di depan bar sambil memegang koktail.
translations.sv: Lisa väntar utanför baren med en cocktail.
translations.ro: Lisa așteaptă în fața barului cu un cocktail.
translations.cs: Lisa čeká před barem s koktejlem.
translations.da: Lisa venter foran baren med en cocktail.
translations.fi: Lisa odottaa baarin edessä cocktailin kanssa.
translations.ja: リサはバーの前でカクテルを持って待っている。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing the dative; introduces a locative PP.
Definite article, feminine, dative singular; agrees with 'Bar'.
